# ZeroLag Deployment Checklist

Generated by `npm run deploy:checklist`. This file is safe to commit because it never prints secret values.

## Current Snapshot

- App version: `0.1.0`
- App mode: `development`
- Release channel: `alpha`
- Payment provider: `manual`
- Update manifest latest: `0.1.1`

## 1. Desktop Client

- [ ] Desktop release mode is production - current: `development`
- [ ] Local demo activation is disabled
- [ ] Production website URL is real HTTPS - current: `https://example.com/zerolag`
- [ ] Purchase URL is real HTTPS - current: `missing`
- [ ] Website analytics URL is real HTTPS - current: `missing`
- [ ] Support URL is real HTTPS - current: `missing`
- [ ] API base URL is real HTTPS - current: `missing`
- [ ] Update manifest URL is real HTTPS - current: `missing`
- [ ] Update public key is configured

## 2. Server Environment

- [ ] Server secret is strong - missing/default
- [ ] Admin secret is strong - missing/default
- [ ] Payment webhook secret is strong - missing/default
- [ ] Durable server state path is configured - missing
- [ ] Durable backup directory is configured - missing
- [x] Server rate limiting is enabled
- [x] Server state backups are enabled
- [x] Automatic maintenance is enabled

## 3. Payment Provider

- [ ] Real payment provider is selected - current: `manual`
- [x] Provider allowlist includes the selected provider
- [ ] Provider allowlist excludes test webhook providers
- [ ] Checkout URL template is configured - current: `zerolag://pay/{orderId}`
- [ ] Payment message is configured

## 4. Release Package And Update Metadata

- [ ] Release version is no longer 0.1.0 - current: `0.1.0`
- [ ] Package description no longer says prototype
- [ ] Update manifest version matches package version - `0.1.1` vs `0.1.0`
- [ ] Update manifest download URL is real HTTPS - current: `https://example.com/zerolag/download`
- [ ] Update manifest is signed
- [ ] Windows code-signing certificate is configured

## 5. Final Commands

Run these in order before a paid public release:

```powershell
npm run deploy:checklist
npm run production:check:strict
npm run server:check:strict
npm run release:preflight:strict
npm run ci
npm run release:build
```

## Notes

- Keep `.secrets/server.env` private and out of Git.
- Do not upload private analytics or operations CSV exports to the public website.
- Replace the JSON state store with a real database before broad public traffic.
